title: Api Error (500): Internal Server Error
excerpt:
Hello i have an issue. DataSource.Error: Web.Contents failed to get contents from ‘https://api.monday.com/v2’ (500): Internal Server Error 
Details: 
DataSourceKind=Web 
DataSourcePath=https://api.monday.com/v2 
Url=http…

posts.author: Ikalaus (Irakli)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello i have an issue. DataSource.Error: Web.Contents failed to get contents from ‘https://api.monday.com/v2’ (500): Internal Server Error
Details:
DataSourceKind=Web
DataSourcePath=https://api.monday.com/v2
Url=https://api.monday.com/v2

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
You’ll need to give us a bit more than that.

  • Where were you seeing this error?
  • Is in a custom app?
  • What payload was being sent to https://api.monday.com/v2?
  • Could it have been a momentary error? There have been some issues with the platform
  • Try again and see if you get a different result
